caption: Realness AND meaning are derived, not asserted: each drawn layer resolves to minted-runtime code (so each is a rect), and the line under each name is the claim of that term's first resolving citation — read from records, so fence/heal/pen read truthfully instead of as a generic gateway. The named-only `threshold` layer cites a backing that resolves nowhere — refused as a gap, dropped not drawn — so the stack flow breaks where it would sit. A fold over committed bytes (term_economy.py), never a second source of truth.

nodes.label:
authentication
the trust ladder:
rungs are bdo's to
grant, denied until
admitted

fence
the registry carries
forbidden-decision
rules (e.g. raw git
push)

gate
observe.gate() is the
consequence-gate: an
under-declared act
HALTS

guard
the command guard
compiles its
deny-rules from the
fence registry

heal
the healing fold
detects a stale-park
bite and proposes the
heal

ledger
the Fold computes
every atom's state
from the append-only
log

patrol
the patrol arms an
escalate marker for
what genuinely needs
bdo

pen
judge() is the one
pen by which a
summoned node writes
its verdict

policy
authorize() is the
PEP — default-deny
over the admitted
policy set

title: Ontum gateway stack · a projection from truth
